title: Convert a manual join to assoc/2
prompt: Write a query function `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_authors/0` that returns posts joined with their authors. Use Ecto's `assoc/2` helper — `join: u in assoc(p, :author)` — rather than a manual `on: p.user_id == u.id` clause. Return `select: {p.title, u.name}`. Write the module to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step: replace the manual `on:` with `assoc/2`. Ecto convention, well-documented, a one-shot for Sonnet.
